entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The crop being engineered for resistance to Aspergillus flavus and aflatoxin accumulation

entities.name: ASPERGILLUS FLAVUS
entities.description: Fungal pathogen that infects peanuts and produces toxic aflatoxins

entities.name: FUSARIUM GRAMINEARUM
entities.description: Filamentous fungus inhibited by MtDef4 and MtDef5

entities.name: NEUROSPORA CRASSA
entities.description: Ascomycete fungus that responds to MtDef4 challenge

entities.name: MEDICAGO TRUNCATULA
entities.description: Plant species in which MtDef4 and MtDef5 are expressed

entities.name: MTDEF4
entities.description: Monomeric cysteine-rich antifungal defensin from Medicago truncatula

entities.name: MTDEF5
entities.description: Bi-domain cysteine-rich antifungal defensin from Medicago truncatula

entities.name: DEFENSINS
entities.description: Sequence divergent cysteine-rich antifungal peptides of innate immunity expressed in plants

entities.name: AFLATOXINS
entities.description: Toxic carcinogenic secondary metabolites produced by Aspergillus flavus

entities.name: ANTIFUNGAL ACTIVITY
entities.description: The ability to inhibit the growth of fungal pathogens

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO ASPERGILLUS FLAVUS
entities.description: The ability of a plant to resist infection by Aspergillus flavus

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO AFLATOXIN ACCUMULATION
entities.description: The ability of a plant to prevent the buildup of aflatoxins in its tissues

entities.name: MEMBRANE PERMEABILIZATION
entities.description: The process of making the fungal plasma membrane permeable, required for MtDef4 activity against F. graminearum

entities.name: PHOSPHATIDIC ACID
entities.description: Bioactive phospholipid that MtDef4 binds to

entities.name: PHOSPHATIDYLINOSITOL MONOPHOSPHATES
entities.description: Phospholipids including PI3P, PI4P, and PI5P that MtDef5 binds to

entities.name: REACTIVE OXYGEN SPECIES
entities.description: Molecules whose accumulation is induced by MtDef5 in fungi

entities.name: TRANSGENIC ENGINEERING
entities.description: The biotechnological strategy of overexpressing apoplast-targeted MtDef4 in peanut lines

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: Region where aflatoxin contamination poses a major threat to public health

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: Region where aflatoxin contamination poses a major threat to public health

entities.name: AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: The presence of aflatoxins in peanuts caused by A. flavus infection
